subcodes.first_line: This, O God, my God, is the day of Naw-Rúz. The morn of heavenly bounties shineth with the resplendently radiant light
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا یوم النیروز و صباح الالطاف یلوح بنور مشرق ساطع لائح من فیض ملکوتک
subcodes.subjects: @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat]
